items.title: AST SpaceMobile: Failing Upwards
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile faces launch delays, thin demand, and Starlink competition—despite a $44B cap. Click here to read more on the ASTS stock

items.title: AST SpaceMobile sees New Glenn setback delaying initial commercial service into 2027
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile expects Blue Origin’s recent launchpad explosion will delay its direct-to-smartphone constellation by three to six months, investment bank William Blair said in an equity research note, pushing initial commercial services into the first half of 2027.

items.title: SpaceX IPO on 12 June: Why These 2 Stocks Matter?
items.excerpt: SpaceX IPO could lift AST SpaceMobile and Rocket Lab as investors seek public exposure to the growing space economy.

items.title: Space stock rally cracks as SpaceX IPO nears and Blue Origin explodes
items.excerpt: Rocket Lab, Intuitive Machines, and AST SpaceMobile drop 17-23% in two days as investors prepare to swap space proxies for SpaceX once the record IPO lands.

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Stock Surges Tuesday: What's Happening?
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile shares are rising Tuesday, bouncing back from strong selling pressure on Monday that swept the broader space sector lower.

items.title: What's Going On With The Slide In AST SpaceMobile Stock?
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile is sliding Monday as traders take profits after a multi‑week surge, even with the Nasdaq up 0.52% and S&P 500 up 0.10%.

items.title: Deutsche Bank Downgrades AST SpaceMobile to Hold From Buy, Cuts Price Target to $106 From $117
items.excerpt: AST SpaceMobile has an average rating of Hold and mean price target of $87.75, according to analysts polled by FactSet. ...

items.title: AST SpaceMobile Makes History in 5G Broadband Cellular Connectivity from Space
items.excerpt: First-ever 5G connection for voice and data between an everyday, unmodified smartphone and a satellite in space.

items.title: T-Mobile Takes Coverage Above and Beyond With SpaceX
items.excerpt: T-Mobile and SpaceX announce Coverage Above and Beyond using Starlink direct-to-cell connectivity.
